rule_text: Setup: use every cell of an empty 4×4 board. Player 0 moves first; turns alternate, and each move places one stone on an empty cell. A player's first stone may be placed on any empty cell. After that player's first stone, a placement is legal only if it is within one king move of a friendly component and it is adjacent to at least two distinct friendly components under that relation. A player wins when one friendly group connected through king-move adjacency contains at least 4 stones. If the next player has no legal placement and the previous move did not win, the previous player wins.
